description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in a fitted suit with a collared shirt and a matching fedora hat. The suit appears to be formal, with a tailored jacket and slim trousers, and the figure is wearing slip-on shoes. The posture suggests a dynamic walking motion, with one arm extended forward and the other slightly back, as if gesturing or engaging in conversation. The facial features are neutral, and the hands are open, adding to the sense of movement. The overall appearance is clean and well-groomed, suitable for an urban or business environment. The figure's proportions and attire indicate a typical adult male pedestrian, likely encountered on city streets or sidewalks.
description: A well-dressed adult male in a suit and fedora, captured mid-walk with expressive hand gestures. The figure exudes a formal, urban style and dynamic movement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, open hand gesture, and full suit with fedora.
description_view_1: Left rear three-quarter view highlighting the back of the suit, hat, and extended stride.
description_view_2: Direct rear view displaying the back of the jacket, hat, and both arms in motion.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizing the profile of the face, suit, and forward-reaching arm.
attribute_clothing_type: formal suit with collared shirt and fedora hat
attribute_hairstyle: short hair mostly covered by hat
